business_quality: Category-defining direct-to-device satellite platform with major strategic carrier relationships.
growth_durability: Potentially very high if commercial service scales, but the company is still in an early and capital-heavy phase.
key_risks: Commercialization timing, satellite deployment execution, ongoing financing needs, and valuation volatility.
valuation_context: The opportunity is unusually large, but the stock trades on future network success more than current financial quality.
notes: ASTS is the least naturally suited to the current scorecard, so the metric inputs here are heavily normalized workflow proxies.
